guardrails.note: Read-only internal link sprint board. It groups manual public-link insertion tasks for review candidates without editing article bodies.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before article body edits, mark:review, publish dry-run, or publish confirm until a human approves exact anchors and target URLs.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: Internal-link suggestions are crawl-path and editorial signals only; no traffic, ranking, impression, click, conversion, or revenue claim is made.
